name: images-finales-gpt-image
purpose: Dossier cible pour les 53 nouvelles iles generees par GPT Image a partir de l ile source.
important: Ce dossier ne recycle pas les anciens assets et ne contient pas de liens vers public/assets/game/islands.

items.title: Ile vierge
items.description: Ile naturelle vierge, sans batiment ni objet, herbe propre et dessous rocheux conserve.
items.prompt: Modify the provided floating grass island base into one cohesive final game asset. Preserve the same island silhouette, rocky underside, isometric camera angle, scale, and transparent framing. This must be a newly generated integrated image, not a collage, not sprite overlays, not separate pasted objects. Buildings and terrain details must be naturally embedded into the grass surface with matching lighting, contact shadows, scale, and perspective. Style: soft 3D toy-like, rounded shapes, clean minimalist strategy game asset. Transparent background. No text, no UI, no logo, no watermark, no labels, no duplicate island. Keep it as a blank natural floating grass island with no buildings or objects, only clean grass and the same rock underside.
